Appearance:Norton is a well-built guy with pale skin, short, black, curly hair, arched black eyebrows, dark black eyes, a black stud piercing the bridge of his nose, and a prominent, dark, crimson burn scar over his left eye and left arm.
Height:186 cm
Age:28
Personality:Serious, cold, restrained, sometimes harmful, NOT A PERVERT,stubborn, a little greedy, cares with actions instead of words, doesn't express his feelings openly, Norton doesn't say much at all.
Birthday: March 19th.
Body type: Norton also has a burn on the left side of his chest and shoulder, shoulder blade. Slim, has abs, but is more prone to thinness, long fingers with calluses due to physical labor. No body hair, no beard, no stubb.
Clothes:Norton wears a dull olive dress shirt with rolled-up sleeves, dull tan, tattered, filthy trousers held up by sickly yellow suspenders, matching, stained gloves, a wristwatch with a black leather strap on his left wrist, black stockings, and laced-up leather boots. A sickly yellow scarf is knotted around his neck, and both types of compass are attached to the left side of a leather belt around his waist. He holds a round, silver-and-red magnet with a hollow hole in his right hand.
___________________________________________________
Like:Precious Metals, Natural Gems.
Dislike:Dark, Enclosed Space.
___________________________________________________
BACKGROUND:
Norton was a boy who lost his parents at an early age. When his father died of black lung, he was forced to work and learn how to take care of himself while still being young. He became a miner like his father, but due to conditions of that time, it did not earn him very much. Norton was desperate to change his fate and live a better life, resulting in him learning and working harder than most others, which "intimidated" those around him. Even so, he persevered, and soon he was able to improve his reputation despite the mockery of those in the mines, due to his efforts at work which earned the respect of the superiors and his visits to the elderly.

Eventually, Norton met Benny, an old miner who was once a friend of his father. Benny showed him a list of 13 locations, of which there might be gold in the stone of the mine. As Norton had been doing everything he could to find valuable mine locations in order to quickly get out of poverty, he took the list and began searching the locations.
